title: The Wizard Seker and the Magical Can Opener of Cat World
summary: In the halls of his castle, the wizard Seker is finishing breakfast when a dragon named Dimatar arrives with a quest. Along with their cat companions, Gorp and Pixie, the group consumes a teleportation potion and travels to the fur-filled realm of Cat World. There, they encounter Silver, a kitten who is struggling to open her food. Rather than simply opening it for her, Seker provides a "snergling" magical can opener to empower the kitten with self-reliance. After ensuring the cats of Cat World can feed themselves, the adventurers drink an "ooloo" potion to return home to the castle.

highlightQuote.text: Meow meow marbel... That means I got my claw stuck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now, would you like to introduce them to the activity we're about to do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Stars and stories, guys.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow, how does it work?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We just tell a story with stars, see?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: With stars? Oh, and when we turn off the light, you will... meow.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Look up! Look up!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Look up! Purr purr purr, says Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow meow, says Gorp.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Once upon a time. Now repeat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Meow meow meow meow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, say once upon a time.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Seker was in his castle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Seker was in his castle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Eating breakfast.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Eating breakfast.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Until the doorbell rang.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Until the doorbell rang.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ding dong! Meow meow, oops.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Dimatar!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's... Who's Dimatar?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dimatar's a dragon. A dragon-et.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. Then what happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dimatar said, let's take a potion.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, potion! Oh, Dimatar said let's take a potion.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And she said, the tube-shaped one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The what-shaped one? Oh, the tube-shaped potion. What's a potion?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A potion is something you drink and once you say a rhyme three times, then you'll appear in... a world.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A world? Yeah. That sounds exciting.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Is that right, Seker?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seker says, well yes, that is an accurate description of the way my potions work. There are many kinds of potions, but I use teleportation potions, and that's just what they do. But I don't know what this one's going to do, Dimatar.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it has to be the oval one. Say the oval one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The oval one? Oh yeah, the oval one, says Seker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hey, are we in this story? says Gorp. What about me? says Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And who's this Seker person?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Seker's a wizard!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Is he a nice wizard?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He's a really nice one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's good. Can we come over to his house and play?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, we're supposed to be telling the story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, oh, okay. And then they took a sip. No, say they took a sip.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They took a sip, yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And they said the rhyme three times.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They said the rhyme three times.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Cat-ka-pat, cat-ka-pat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Cat-ka-pat.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And suddenly, meow! They appeared in Cat World.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Cat World! Yay! You're included! Oh, we get to be in the story now, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Seker, and then what does Seker say? Dad, your turn and the cats repeat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, and Seker said, my goodness, we appear to be in a very strange world full of fur.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, no, it's Cat World, Seker! Can you say all that, cats?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No, it's Cat World, Seker!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seker says, where did that voice come from? And Gorp said, it was me! And I said it was me! And then what did I say? Oh, Gorp, you can say whatever you want to say because you're in the story now.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! So I said, yes! Welcome to Cat World, where... No, we're supposed to be repeating.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, no, we're supposed to be repeating.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then I said, Gorp Gorp Gorp, we're supposed to be repeating.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah, what do I say now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Silver and Finn have a problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Silver and Finn have a problem.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The problem is they can't open their cans.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The problem is they can't open their cans.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then what do they do? Let's ask Seker. Seker, what do... what do they do? Dad, it's your turn again.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, and Seker said, oh dear, Silver and Finn, you must be so hungry.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, only Silver has trouble opening her cans because she's the kitten.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Silver, I see. Well, we're here to help. And Silver said, meow meow meow meow meow meow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She only... she can say meow and meow and purr and hey and purr and hate.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, purr and hate. Oh, what does Silver hate?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She just says hate. She likes hate. She likes saying hate.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. And Seker said, well, I could magically open this can for you right now, Silver, but I think you'd be better off if you learned how to do it all by yourself. And Silver said, meow meow meow meow meow meow. I know, Silver, said Seker. You're hungry right now, but it's going to be worth it, trust me. So, you're going to learn how to use a very powerful device called a magical can opener. It's a little bit like an electric can opener, but it's even better. And I happen to have brought one with me right here in the pocket of my cloak, just in case I need to open any cans.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: See?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Silver said, meow! Yes, I know it's surprising. But just watch this. Now, what did the magical can opener look like, Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I think it was a box, and you can put the can inside, and then it makes a really funny sound. What's the sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Snergle snergle snergle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, it's a snergle sound.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Snergle snergle snergle. Yeah, that's right, Gorp. Pixie, are you sleeping? Zzz.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wake up! We're telling an exciting story here, Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, oh, oh yeah, okay, I'm in the story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pixie doesn't talk like that. Pixie talks like this: Hello, hello.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, yes. Hello, hello. Well, Pixie, what happened next was that Seker showed Silver how to put her can into the magical can opener, and then it made a sound like this: snergle snergle snergle. And then, pop! There was a pop, and the lid popped right off. And Silver went, meow! And Seker said, yes, you may eat your wet food, and she went... [eating sounds].

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, she doesn't eat it from the box. She's supposed to eat it from her dish with the kibble.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, yes. So Silver carefully took her can out of the box, of the magic can opener, and dumped it into her dish with her kibble. And then she slurped it up.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Silver says, I... well, I was supposed to open her can. Next time can I do it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seker said, yes, you may use the magical can opener now that you know how to.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, but I know how to do the latch.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the latch! I see. But that's something only people with human hands can do, and cats with their paws cannot open the latch. But Silver, I will leave this magical can opener box here for you in Cat World so that you can open your own cans of food anytime you wish. And how did Silver respond to that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow meow marbel... That means I got my claw stuck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You did, said Seker. Where did you get your claw stuck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Right here, right here.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, I hope you enjoy having your new magical can opener. But I think our work here is done, everyone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now, Gorp and Pixie, I'll introduce you to the idea of the going-home potion. Are you ready?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And everyone take a sip.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I made up a sound for the going... it's called ooloo!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ooloo! That's a good sound. And then, poof! They were back at Seker's castle. Well, I'm glad you came along, Gorp, and I'm glad you came along too, Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pixie, let me show you how to do this. And also this.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, this is a job for you that you're going to show Pixie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, and look, a little hand shadow...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, you've got to turn off your phone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, but could you please turn on the... lamp first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. And Pixie and Gorp...

characters.name: Seker
characters.description: A kind wizard who lives in a castle and possesses various magical teleportation potions.

characters.name: Dimitar
characters.description: A sharp-witted resident of a circular island castle, this two-century-old purple dragonet carries a pirate’s salt-crusted legacy and a fierce devotion to his salvaged library. Formerly of the Cadasori galleries, Seeker’s grumpy companion now roams the deep to save his ancestral shores, though a recent volcanic disturbance has left him uncharacteristically sickened and frail. Driven by habit and a tireless appetite for fish, he bickers incessantly over snacks while guarding his remaining volumes with a brooding, protective intensity.

characters.name: Silver
characters.description: Immortalized in the stone of the Great Library yet reborn in Cat World as a small, hungry kitten, Izzy is a brave companion who now traverses the heart of Limbo. Communicating through an ancient, rhythmic language of resonant purrs and wielding a masterfully handled magical can opener, this tiny spirit balances her arcane legacy with a newfound, desperately urgent need for snuggles.

characters.name: Finn
characters.description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

characters.name: Gorp
characters.description: A cat traveler who journeys to Cat World and discovers his role in the story.

characters.name: Pixie
characters.description: A nimble operative in Kitty’s elite superhero squad, this scholarly feline balances tactical missions and Ginger Catasorry studies with a profound appreciation for restorative slumber. Currently navigating a perilous underground expedition, the talking adventurer greets each waking moment with a signature "Hello, hello," shifting seamlessly from a quiet nap to the sharp-eyed focus required for subterranean survival.

places.name: Seker's Castle
places.description: The home and laboratory of the wizard Seker where the story begins and ends.

places.name: Cat World
places.description: A tactile, fur-filled dimension reachable only through specialized magic potions, this plush realm serves as a hidden destination for those who master the art of alchemical teleportation.
